title: Miklos' Military Armor
description: Mod that adds modern and cold war military uniforms
body:
**1.20.1 VERSION DOES NOT WORK WITH OPTIFINE!**


_Write armor ideas in the comments_




I recommend you to turn off you skin layer!
(ESC -> Options -> Skin Customisation)







keybind:
"N" turn On/Off Helmet Abilities (Use with K6-3 Helmets, Maska-1sh Helmets and helmets with night vission and goggles)

"G" Open Parachute





This mod contains uniforms from:

-Russia

-USA

-Ukraine

-Germany

-Poland

-Czechia

And from some cold war countries





**You can use my mod on any public server**
